jsonLd.title: FabHotels is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
FabHotels invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FabHotels:
FabHotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabHotels!
